report.summary: Cycle v19: git index.lock still blocking all commits (10+ hours). Working tree grew to 513 files. 2 new learn guides (Fair Token Launches, PEAQ DePIN) built and queued. 374 published pages stable. 0/6 API routes have rate limiting (15th consecutive flag). FOMC T-1.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: No new commits since cb65a9d (Day 42 publish) — git index.lock continues blocking.
6 pages modified since last EOD: 4 learn guides (jupiter, fair-token-launches, ondo-finance, peaq-depin) + 2 tools (dex-screener, sentiment-dashboard).
PUBLISHED_PAGES: 374 slugs. ~102 slugs lack dedicated page.tsx but are served by learn/[slug] dynamic route — not a regression.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 pages — /learn/fair-token-launches-guide-2026, /learn/peaq-depin-robotics-guide-2026.

TypeScript: 42 errors across 2 files (unchanged) — 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts, needs .tsx rename), 2 in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 (unescaped < > in JSX). Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true).
No new regressions detected this cycle.

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko, 60s TTL, s-maxage=60, circuit breaker. No fallback data, no rate limiter.
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me, 600s TTL, s-maxage=600, circuit breaker. No fallback data, no rate limiter.
/api/trending — CoinGecko, 300s TTL, s-maxage=300, circuit breaker. No fallback data, no rate limiter.
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko aggregated, 60s TTL, Promise.allSettled, circuit breaker. No rate limiter.
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko, 300s TTL, full FALLBACK_DATA present. No rate limiter.
/api/defi-yields — DefiLlama, HTTP cache only (no in-memory TTL), returns 500 on failure. No fallback, no rate limiter.
PERSISTENT: checkRateLimit() applied to 0/6 public routes — 15th consecutive cycle flagged. FOMC Wed Mar 18 (T-1) may spike traffic to unprotected endpoints.
All 6 routes share api-helpers.ts circuit breaker (5 failures, 1min reset) + exponential backoff.

sections.title: DevOps Status
items: Latest deploy: cb65a9d (Day 42 publish). No new commits, no new deploys this cycle.
git index.lock created ~13:06 today — now 10+ hours old. Blocking ALL commits. 513 uncommitted files (up from 509 in v18, net +4).
Next.js config stable: standalone output, ignoreBuildErrors true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency 4.
Middleware healthy at 127 lines — security headers, robots tags, cache-control configured.
No incidents detected. Vercel deployment presumed healthy (sandbox cannot verify externally).

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: SHIPPED: Nothing committed or deployed — git index.lock blocking all progress.
BUILT THIS CYCLE: 2 new learn guides (Fair Token Launches + PEAQ DePIN Robotics), 2 tool pages updated (dex-screener, sentiment-dashboard). All uncommitted.
DELTA SINCE v18: Working tree +4 files (509→513). PUBLISH_QUEUE changed from jupiter+ondo to fair-token-launches+peaq-depin (jupiter+ondo guides now built as page.tsx).

CARRY-OVER (priority): (1) rm .git/index.lock — single biggest blocker. (2) Batch-commit 513 files. (3) Apply checkRateLimit to 6 API routes (15 cycles overdue). (4) Rename structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx. (5) Fix unescaped JSX in crypto-index-funds-guide. (6) Add fallback data to fear-greed, trending, defi-yields.
BLOCKER FOR JEFE: git index.lock must be removed (rm .git/index.lock) before any work can ship. 513 files of uncommitted work at risk.
